title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Spiral Review
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a typed cancellable data coordinator after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model promise fulfillment values and rejection handling without pretending rejected types are encoded in Promise.
Predict async return inference and retain discriminated result relationships across awaits.
Propagate AbortSignal and distinguish cancellation, timeout, transport, parsing, and domain failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

// typescript-basics cumulative strict TypeScript portfolio.
